motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def alternateDigitSum(self, n: int) -> int:
    sign_sum = 0
    for i in range(int(math.log10(n)) // 2 + 1):
        sign = 1
        if i < len(str(n)):
            sign *= -1
        sign_sum += sign * int(n % 10)
        n //= 10
    return sign_sum

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log(n))
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
